name: Mexican Shepherd's Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
1 1/2 cups low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add turkey, onions, bell peppers, and garlic. Cook until turkey is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in chicken broth, 1 1/2 teaspoons chili powder, salt, grated cheese, crushed tomatoes, and corn.
6. Pour the turkey mixture into the prepared pan.
7. In a small bowl, combine mashed potatoes and remaining chili powder.
8. Spoon the potato mixture on top of the turkey mixture.
9. Bake for 25 minutes or until bubbly.
